content: How do I implement authentication in FastAPI?

I retrieved relevant documentation but failed to generate a response via Gemini. Please verify your GOOGLE_API_KEY. (Error: Error calling model 'gemini-1.5-flash' (INVALID_ARGUMENT): 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT. {'error': {'code': 400, 'message': 'API key not valid.
